mapper.select: SELECT r.code FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND r.status = 0

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.code = #{roleCode} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND r.status = 0
